subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! In truth, the letter which thou didst write to Jinab-i-Manshadi was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نمودی ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
